meta.title: One Day Korea Trip — All-Inclusive Booking via WhatsApp
meta.description: All-inclusive one-day Korea package for Indonesian travelers. Detailed itinerary, transparent pricing, and direct WhatsApp booking.
meta.ogDescription: 10–12 hour program with detailed itinerary, hanbok experience, food, and city highlights.

hero.title:
One Day Korea Trip
Detailed Program + Clear Budget 🇮🇩✨🇰🇷
hero.subtitle: Tap each package card to see hour-by-hour itinerary, inclusions, and cost breakdown. Perfect for travelers who want clear value before booking.

sections.packagesHint: Tap / click a package card to view detailed itinerary, inclusions, and all-inclusive cost breakdown.

packages.title: Seoul Trend & Café Hopping
packages.tagline: Best for viral spots, aesthetic cafés, and light shopping
highlights: Hongdae creative streets + curated content spots
Efficient route planning to minimize wasted time

itinerary.title: Meet-up & route briefing
itinerary.desc: Daily rundown, content checklist, and weather backup options.

itinerary.title: Hongdae trend walk
itinerary.desc: Viral street areas, photo angles, and quick fashion/K-beauty picks.

itinerary.title: Lunch set
itinerary.desc: Popular Korean meal with non-spicy options if needed.

itinerary.title: Café hopping session
itinerary.desc: 2 curated cafés, each including 1 signature drink.

itinerary.title: Myeongdong night vibe
itinerary.desc: Street atmosphere, snack stop, and free shopping time.

packages.notes: All-inclusive per person for Seoul route. Personal shopping is not included.

packages.title: K-Culture Explorer (Hanbok Included)
packages.tagline: Korean culture route with hanbok experience + sunset city point

itinerary.title: Hanbok fitting session
itinerary.desc: Choose hanbok, basic accessories, and quick styling for cultural photos.

itinerary.title: Bukchon + palace route
itinerary.desc: Heritage walking route with recommended photo points.

itinerary.title: Lunch stop
itinerary.desc: Lunch with halal-friendly / non-pork menu options.

itinerary.title: Culture café break
itinerary.desc: Short rest before moving to Namsan area.

packages.notes: With hanbok, some palace areas may allow free entry depending on local policy on visit day.

packages.title: Nature + City Balance
packages.tagline: Relaxed aesthetic route balancing city parks and hidden alleys
highlights: Seoul Forest / Hangang route for a relaxed vibe
Skyline ending spot for night photos

itinerary.title: Start at Seoul Forest
itinerary.desc: Morning walk, natural-light photo spots, and mini content briefing.

itinerary.title: Brunch set
itinerary.desc: Brunch + drink with curated budget menu.

itinerary.title: Hangang picnic concept
itinerary.desc: Picnic mat + basic snack set for a laid-back session.

itinerary.title: Ikseondong alley route
itinerary.desc: Hidden-gem route for architecture photos + café stop.

itinerary.title: Skyline ending
itinerary.desc: Wrap-up at the best city-view night spot for the day.

packages.notes: All-inclusive price reflects average Seoul day costs for food/drink and mobility.
